creator: agh@riseup.net
text:
Created attachment 206777
Update mastersite to reflect new location of distfile models.zip

Port fails to build because distfile models.zip has moved:

=> models.zip doesn't seem to exist in /portdistfiles/quake2-extras.
=> Attempting to fetch http://www-personal.umich.edu/~jimw/q2/aq2_install/models.zip

fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/quake2-extras/models.zip: Not Found

=> port manually into /portdistfiles/quake2-extras and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/games/quake2-extras
=>> Cleaning up wrkdir
===>  Cleaning for quake2-extras-1.0
build of games/quake2-extras | quake2-extras-1.0 ended at Wed Aug 14 02:29:05 UTC 2019
build time: 00:00:05
!!! build failure encountered !!!

Distfile is now relocated at:
http://www-personal.umich.edu/~jimw/q2/Quake2/baseq2/:models

See attached patch for fix.
